entity.summary: Hybrid derivatives protocol and trading venue combining request-for-quote execution and aggregated liquidity with on-chain clearing and settlement for perpetuals and customizable derivatives.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation identifies Variational as peer-to-peer derivatives infrastructure and Omni as its live Arbitrum perpetual-trading application with hundreds of markets, wallet-based access, request-for-quote execution, and on-chain settlement pools. Current independently maintained metrics report substantial non-zero perpetual volume and open interest. HEI uses hybrid because execution and liquidity aggregation include off-chain components while collateral settlement and clearing are on-chain. The protocol and Omni application remain one entity-first record. No exact full-entity launch date, legal jurisdiction, predecessor, successor, or terminal lifecycle fact is asserted.

evidence.title: What Is Variational
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies Variational as peer-to-peer derivatives infrastructure and Omni as its live perpetual-trading application with hundreds of markets, wallet access, request-for-quote execution, and on-chain clearing and settlement.

evidence.title: Variational protocol metrics
evidence.notes: Current protocol metrics report substantial non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day perpetual volume together with open interest, supporting active classification.
